biological_replicate: we used mat3-4 (strain CC-3994) Chlamydomonas reinhardtii cells
technical_replicate: each tomogram was acquired from a separate cell and thus is both a biological and technical replicate
experimental_design: the proteasome clusters define cytosolic microcompartments of distinct protein composition
factor_value: Cdc48 and proteasomes were detected with similar protein abundance
number_of_technical_replicates: each tomogram was acquired from a separate cell
number_of_samples: 76 biological samples described, and 3 fractions were analyzed
